sections.paragraph: f. an early fig, regarded as a delicacy on that account, Mic 7:1 Hos 9:10 Isa 28:4 (where it is better with some copies to read בִּכּוּרָה with ה without Mappik, than בִּכּוּרָהּ, with the Masor. and edit. as the suffix. is weak); in Morocco now called بوكر, باكورة boccôre, Spanish Albacora.
